task_objective: Implement frontend and backend refinements: persistent selection, unified logging, and SpinnerButtons.
design_decisions: Added selected_game to persistent settings in the backend.
Renamed internal _log to public log in SDHLudusaviService and exposed it via RPC.
Integrated frontend log() utility with backend decky.logger and internal ring buffer.
Created SpinnerButton component to provide inline loading feedback.
Synchronized dropdown selection with backend persistence.
results: All refinements implemented, verified with tests, and frontend build successful.
